message: Income verification failure: 4 households in units 2B-104, 2B-207, 3B-301, and 3B-305 have incomes exceeding the AMI-50 threshold. Developer failed to recertify and adjust rents at annual recertification.
Property tax delinquency of $47,832 for tax year 2025. 60-day cure period expires January 14, 2026. Failure to cure may trigger covenant default provisions.
note: Developer contacted. Claims payment processing delay with lender escrow. Monitoring.

message: Committed rents exceed AMI-50 limits: 2BR units at $620/mo (limit $540), 3BR units at $810/mo (limit $708). Rent reduction and tenant reimbursement required per covenant Section 4.2.
Affordability period expires January 15, 2028 (22 months remaining). 130 affordable units at risk. Developer renewal discussions initiated but no commitment received.
Ownership transfer documentation overdue. Updated operating agreement and covenant assignment confirmation were due February 15, 2026. Now 41 days past deadline.
